top_items.title: Gemini for Government: Build custom AI agents for unclassified work on GenAI.mil
top_items.one_liner: Introduces Agent Designer for Gemini for Government, enabling custom AI agent creation on GenAI.mil.

top_items.title: Cost-Effective AI with Ollama, GKE GPU Sharing, and vCluster
top_items.one_liner: Demonstrates cost-effective AI scaling on Google Cloud using Ollama, GKE GPU sharing, and vCluster.

top_items.title: Make security simpler: Introducing the Google Cloud recommended security checklist
top_items.one_liner: Offers a recommended security checklist for Google Cloud, inspired by MVSP principles, to simplify security management.
